title: Need advice on workflow concept - how to setup so tasks in a board autofill the "core" information?
excerpt: I am experimenting with a concept workflow with each project being contained to a board. Lots of details to work out, but my initial help question is - is it possible to setup a workflow so a number of columns are automa…

posts.author: TLC-Troy (Troy Chollar)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am experimenting with a concept workflow with each project being contained to a board. Lots of details to work out, but my initial help question is - is it possible to setup a workflow so a number of columns are automatically populated when a new task is created?

All-in-One Dashboard Concept - 11915×1693 399 KB

See attached image of project board in development. The red columns on right will be the same information for every task on that board. Of course, I do not want to enter the same information each time a task is added, but I do not have any ideas of what to even search for, for this type of automation. Ideas/recommendations please

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@TLC-Troy

If, as you say, every “red” column on a board has at least the same initial value, the easiest way to do this is to use “Item default values”. They can be accessed as seen below:

image1243×278 19.9 KB

They primary issue with using the defaults is that they currently only allow constant values. For dynamic values like “creating user” or “today’s date + X days” most of the time you can use automations to set these values. Beyond that, it is sometimes necessary to use a call to a Make/Integromat scenario or similar.

Jim - The Monday Man (YouTube Channel)
Watch Our Latest Video: A Status Column Tip - When is “Done” really DONE?

posts.author: TLC-Troy (Troy Chollar)
posts.cookedHtml: @JCorrell - Default Values are a new feature (to me) and in experimenting they are perfect for this scenario! Thank you!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: So glad to hear the Default Values feature was a good fit here, @TLC-Troy! Let us know at support@monday.com if you run into any further questions!
